tier: Tier 7.7h - Lorenz Capacity / NARMA Memory-Depth Scoring Gate
claim: Tier 7.7h scored the locked Lorenz/NARMA capacity matrix. Capacity improved Mackey-Glass and Lorenz materially, but the gate classified the result as overfit_or_sham_blocked because Lorenz did not separate from the permuted-recurrence sham at the best capacity; repaired NARMA improved only weakly.
caveat: Scoring evidence only; not a baseline freeze, not a mechanism promotion, not hardware/native evidence, not public usefulness evidence, and not external-baseline superiority.
